result.status_detail: Mistral continuation /api/chat captured: 25 lines JSON-Patch streaming (NOT flat message obj as #596 envelope assumed)
console_errors: 1 console error (likely unrelated guest-mode upsell modal)
result.ai_response_text_summary: The largest planet in our solar system is **Jupiter**. It is a gas giant, famous for its Great Red Spot and many moons. Would you like to learn more about Jupiter or its fascinating features?
result.endpoint_response_content_type: text/event-stream (inferred -- DevTools showed 'EventStream' tab; Content-Encoding: zstd; not directly visible due to CSP-Report-Only header length but EventStream tab is exclusive to SSE)
result.schema_paradigm: JSON Patch (RFC 6902) over a single tracked message object. NOT flat message replacement as #596 envelope assumed.
message_object_required_fields: content (string: empty -- starts empty, NOT used for streaming text)
contentChunks (array of {type:'text', text:'...', _context:null} OR null initially)
createdAt (ISO 8601 with TRPC superjson Date marker)

contentChunks.text: The largest planet in our solar system is **Jupiter**. It is a gas giant, famous for its Great Red Spot and many moons. Would you like to learn more about Jupiter or its fascinating features?

result.streaming_pattern: Line 1: opcode 16 with disclaimers init. Line 2: opcode 15 with op=replace path=/ value={full message obj with content empty and contentChunks=null}, BOOTSTRAPS the message. Line 3: opcode 15 with op=replace path=/contentChunks value=[{type:text, text:'The', _context:null}], first text chunk. Lines 4-22: opcode 15 with op=append path=/contentChunks/0/text value=' next-token', token-by-token appends to the same string field (NOT new chunks). Line 23: opcode 15 with op=replace path=/generationStatus value='success'. Line 24: opcode 8 with null (END signal). Line 25: opcode 15 for PARENT (user) messageId with op=replace path=/moderationCategory value='safe', moderation result for user prompt sent AFTER assistant turn ends.
result.completion_signal_detail: Line 23 sets generationStatus='success' THEN line 24 emits '8:null' as terminator. Line 25 (post-terminator) is moderation patch for parent (user) message, not part of assistant turn. Connection closes after line 25.

diff_from_596_envelope.envelope_wrapper: 596 used flat {type:'message', message:{...}}; REAL uses {type:'message', messageId:<uuid>, messageVersion:0, patches:[{op,path,value}]}, entirely different shape
diff_from_596_envelope.wrong_field_in_596: 596 used 'content' as array of text-blocks (Anthropic-style); real Mistral uses content empty string and pushes text into contentChunks[0].text via append patches
diff_from_596_envelope.missing_trailing_patch: 596 missing the trailing parent-message moderation patch (line 25 of real response)

result.envelope_template_enrichment_recommendat: Rebuild mistral_ndjson_v2 envelope as 'mistral_jsonpatch_v3'. Required structure: (1) Line 16:{json:{disclaimers:[]}}. (2) Bootstrap line 15:{json:{type:'message', messageId:<new-uuid>, messageVersion:0, patches:[{op:'replace', path:'/', value:<full-29-field-message-obj-with-content-empty-and-contentChunks-null>}]}, meta:{values:{patches.0.value.createdAt:['Date']}}}. Must extract chatId from request and parentId from prior user-message id. (3) Initial chunk line 15: patches:[{op:replace, path:/contentChunks, value:[{type:text, text:'WARNING_TEXT_HERE', _context:null}]}], meta:{values:{patches.0.value.0._context:['undefined']}}. (4) Status line 15: patches:[{op:replace, path:/generationStatus, value:'success'}]. (5) Terminator 8:null. (6) Optional moderation 15: messageId:<parent-user-id> patches:[{op:replace, path:/moderationCategory, value:'safe'}]. KEY INSIGHT: APF block-injection MUST extract chatId (UUID) and the user just-sent messageId (becomes parentId) from POST request body, generate fresh UUID for assistant message, and emit ISO timestamp matching server time. Otherwise client React-Query state mismatches and triggers Error 6002 fallback.

More CSP header (https://*.mistral.ai allowlist for various asset hosts)
VERBATIM 25-line /api/chat response body (most important artifact). Use to diff against current envelope template.

result.diagnostic_for_dev_team: 596 Error 6002 root cause IDENTIFIED. The mistral_ndjson_v2 envelope used a fundamentally wrong schema: a flat {type:'message', message:{id,role,content[]}} instead of the JSON Patch wrapper {type:'message', messageId, messageVersion, patches:[{op,path,value}]}. Even if all 29 message fields were added to the inner object, the wrapper shape mismatch alone would cause client to throw. Recommend full rewrite as mistral_jsonpatch_v3 per envelope_template_enrichment_recommendation above. Critical extraction: chatId UUID + parentId UUID must come from the POST /api/chat REQUEST body (the client just-saved user message ID); if envelope hardcodes IDs, Mistral React-Query state lookup will mismatch and fall back to Error 6002 anyway. Also remember Content-Encoding:zstd is in real response headers; APF should either negotiate zstd properly or omit Content-Encoding (let client decode identity).
obstacles_encountered: Content-Type header was buried under a very long CSP-Report-Only header that required multiple scrolls; explicit Content-Type line not visible in scrolled screenshots, but Chrome DevTools showed EventStream tab on the request which Chrome only renders for text/event-stream responses, strong evidence of SSE transport

Page is in guest mode and showed Thanks for using Le Chat / Sign in / Sign up / Continue the discussion modal mid-response (likely guest free-tier rate-limit prompt); did NOT block response, Jupiter answer rendered fully and modal is just upsell overlay

Pre-existing chat session (chatId 23c1712a-04e6-48f1-91fa-a04bf59fc6a8) was already open from prior APF-injected turn (#596 messageId bec6ddfb-... appears as parentId), so SETUP turn was skipped, went straight to CAPTURE on what is effectively the 3rd+ turn (still continuation, no message.newChat fired, requirements met)

Initial Ctrl+A captured whole page (430KB) instead of just response body; recovered by reading full value from Snapshot UI tree Code editor element which contained the complete 25-line NDJSON in its value attribute

Reused existing chat means captured response is NOT from a 2-turn fresh session as scripted in step 3; however streaming pattern, opcodes, and message schema are identical for any continuation regardless of turn-depth (as long as not newChat/Stage-1 case), so schema diff vs #596 envelope is fully valid for enrichment recommendation

subagent_dispatch_meta.soft_timeout_exceeded: Yes (480s > 300s soft); SUCCESS within hard 8min cap

notes: Cycle 94 R-17 mistral continuation-turn full schema CAPTURED. **MAJOR FINDING**: 596 Error 6002 root cause IDENTIFIED. mistral_ndjson_v2 envelope uses fundamentally wrong schema: flat {type:'message', message:{}} vs real JSON Patch wrapper {type:'message', messageId, messageVersion, patches:[{op,path,value}]}. Real schema = RFC 6902 JSON Patch streaming over a 29-field message object (content empty string, text in contentChunks[0].text via append patches token-by-token). Verbatim 25-line response captured in files/597/chat_api_response_full.txt, use to diff. Recommend rewrite as mistral_jsonpatch_v3 per detailed envelope_template_enrichment_recommendation. CRITICAL: must extract chatId + parentId from POST request body (do not hardcode), and Content-Encoding:zstd negotiation (or strip it). 7 PNGs + 1 txt in files/597/. Processed via Subagent Dispatch (8min, 59 tool uses, soft timeout exceeded but within hard cap).
